rationale: The war continues without new qualitative escalation; Iran deal stalemate keeps US attention partially diverted from Ukraine aid; European defence autonomy debate is indirectly relevant to future support.

top_events.title: Active war with Russia — ongoing strikes and frontline activity
top_events.summary: War continues with no new qualitative escalation this cycle; air strikes and frontline fighting remain the daily reality for Ukrainians. Baseline decays slightly as no major new development reported.

top_events.title: France-Germany jet plans: Can Europe end reliance on US for security?
top_events.summary: European defence autonomy discussions are directly relevant to Ukraine's long-term security guarantees and weapons supply, though no immediate aid change results from this cycle.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate keeps US diplomatic bandwidth diverted, sustaining risk that Western military aid focus on Ukraine may remain under pressure.
